Hostel Review — Lisbon, Portugal: The Lisbon Lounge Hostel in the Bairro Alto neighborhood earns high marks for its social atmosphere, well-equipped kitchen, and extremely helpful staff who arrange nightly group activities. Dorm beds in 8-person rooms run approximately €22–28 per night, making it one of the best-value options in the city center. The building is a restored 19th-century townhouse with original azulejo tile work and high ceilings, creating a unique aesthetic despite basic amenities. Noise levels in street-facing rooms can be high on weekend evenings; request a courtyard-facing room if you're a light sleeper.
